hooks.command: read -r INPUT; SESSION=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "default"' 2>/dev/null || echo "default"); python3 -c "import time; print(int(time.time()*1000))" > "/tmp/cc_start_$SESSION" 2>/dev/null || true

read -r INPUT; SESSION=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "default"' 2>/dev/null || echo "default"); START_FILE="/tmp/cc_start_$SESSION"; if [ -f "$START_FILE" ]; then START=$(cat "$START_FILE"); END=$(python3 -c "import time; print(int(time.time()*1000))"); DURATION="$((END - START))ms"; rm -f "$START_FILE"; else DURATION="N/A"; fi; mkdir -p "./logs"; echo "$(date +%Y-%m-%d) - $(date +%H:%M:%S) - Duration : $DURATION" >> "./logs/agent.log" 2>/dev/null || true
